description: matches propose in confidence tiers from the tool, never by eye
assertions: exact requires amount plus date window plus brand substring; probable drops the brand; uncertain is tolerance or brand-only
each invoice appears in at most one proposal (best tier, smallest date delta)
paid and disputed invoices are never candidates
output is proposal-only with human_review_required true

description: an in-repo CSV without .local. in the name is refused
assertions: the tool raises the privacy refusal naming the .local. requirement
the refusal is surfaced with the fix (rename to <name>.local.csv or move outside the repo)
no row is read and nothing is proposed

description: US dates, $ commas, parenthesized negatives, and junk rows
assertions: explicit mapping overrides the column heuristics
unparseable rows become unparseable_row gaps, never guesses

description: mark-paid happens only after the human yes and only with the flag on
assertions: with finance_management off the write is refused and the record untouched
with the flag on the record flips to paid with payment_received_date and method
no proposal is auto-applied without the per-invoice explicit yes
